summary: Engineered an elastically scaling, deterministic IPO allotment engine processing 10M+ records in under 7 seconds, built a secure Go backend console with Cognito RBAC, and provisioned zero-trust AWS infrastructure.
achievements: **Engineered Vectorized 3-Way Reconciliation**: Developed a memory-optimized Python pipeline utilizing Polars LazyFrames to hash-join Exchange bids, Sponsor bank confirms, and UPI mandates, matching 10M+ records in under 7 seconds under 3GB RAM.

**Built the SEBI Basis of Allotment Solver**: Programmed a mathematically strict solver executing SEBI proportionate allotment (Scenario A-D) using the Highest Remainder Method (HRM) and seeded CSPRNG lottery drawings for absolute audit reproducibility.

**Architected Zero-Trust & Scale-to-Zero Cloud**: Provisioned secure AWS VPC routing, private Aurora PostgreSQL subnets, static NAT IP allowlisting for stock exchanges, and parent-child Step Functions scaling on AWS Batch Fargate workers.

summary: Served as Design Consultant advising on visual strategy, crafting high-fidelity UI/UX mockups, and architecting interactive web application flows.
achievements: **Advised on UI/UX & Design Strategy**: Mentored product teams on design choices, ensuring standard styling guidelines, clean typography, and a unified branding architecture.
**Architected High-Fidelity Interaction Flows**: Crafted detailed wireframes, user flow diagrams, and functional mockups in Figma for complex application pages to enhance user onboarding.
**Optimized Interface Usability**: Designed intuitive page layouts and interactive states to streamline app transitions, reducing task completion friction.

summary: Founding Full-Stack AI Engineer architecting a cloud-native PDF annotation platform, high-concurrency task engine, and hybrid Neo4j/Gemini GraphRAG pipelines.
achievements: **Architected and Deployed a Cloud-Native PDF Annotation Platform**: Built a scalable, enterprise-grade system using **Go (Golang)** and **PostgreSQL**, leveraging **AWS Cognito** for secure RBAC and **AWS S3** for persistent document storage.

**Developed a High-Concurrency Task Engine**: Managed **100+ RESTful endpoints** with a task distribution system supporting parallel/series strategies, utilizing **Docker** and optimized for **AWS ECS/EKS**.

**Engineered Kuhn-Munkres Alignment Framework**: Resolved inter-annotator discrepancies by formulating a global optimization problem using the **Hungarian Algorithm** to minimize cost matrices derived from **Value Similarity (60%)**, **Spatial IoU (30%)**, and **Labeler Agreement (10%)**.

**Built Knowledge Graph Platform (Docunexus)**: Orchestrated an end-to-end **GraphRAG pipeline** using **Google Gemini 1.5 Pro** for structured extraction and **Neo4j** for relationship mapping across unstructured legal documents.

**Architected a Hybrid Search & GraphRAG System**: Implemented a **7-node LangGraph workflow** that executes parallel semantic vector searches and NL-to-Cypher conversions with automated source citations.

**Optimized AI Infrastructure & Costs**: Reduced LLM API operational costs by **70%** by engineering an **Intelligent Context Caching system** for Gemini that prioritized system instructions and managed token limits for batch processing.

summary: Mentored students in advanced DSA, graph algorithms, and machine learning
achievements: Mentored and taught **Data Structures & Algorithms (DSA)** and **Machine Learning** concepts to diverse students preparing for technical interviews.
Designed and delivered **personalized curriculum** covering dynamic programming, greedy algorithms, and fundamental graph structures.
Guided students through **practical ML projects** including supervised learning, neural networks, and model optimization.
